properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O Lord my God, when I in awesome wonder Consider all the works Thy hands have made I see the stars, I hear the rolling thunder Thy power through out the universe displayed!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then sings my soul, my Savior God, to Thee How great Thou art, how great Thou art! Then sings my soul, my Savior God, to Thee How great Thou art, how great Thou art!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When Christ shall come with shout of acclamation And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart! Then I shall bow in humble adoration And there proclaim, my God, how great Thou art!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Great and mighty, awesome, wonderful You conquer all! God, our Father, God omnipotent You reign on us!
